title: Cubical Critters
description: Changes the models of Rabbits, Cats, Sheep, and (sort of) Bats
body:
Requires [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or Optifine!

## Features
* Cats are considerably chunkier, and have been given whiskers and a more detailed face
* Rabbits are simpler and more pixel-consistent
* Changed sheep models and textures, inspired by those from StitchSprites' [Faithless](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/faithless)!
* Bats are pixel consistent (technically its model isn't actually changed, as it's possible to fit a pixel-consistent texture on the vanilla model)
